name: Restaurant / Café
description: Menu, hours, location, and reservations for your restaurant or café.
ai_context: This is a single-page static restaurant/café website (HTML/CSS/JS, no build tools). Sections: hero with tagline, menu organized by categories (Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks) with prices and dietary labels (V/VG/GF), about section with story, hours & location with a map placeholder, and a reservation form (saves to localStorage). CSS custom properties in :root for easy rebranding — warm earthy color scheme by default. The user will likely ask to: change the restaurant name/cuisine, edit menu items and prices, add food photos, change colors to match their brand, add an online ordering section, add a gallery, embed a real Google Map, connect a real reservation system, add social media links, add a catering page, etc.
